---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="section-card">
<h2>Main Projects</h2>

<p>
These projects are examples of my experience in public health data analysis, database design, and interactive visualization. Each project focuses on transforming complex datasets into meaningful insights for research and policy.
</p>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Alcohol Use and Psychological Distress Dashboard</h3>

<p>
This project explores the relationship between alcohol consumption, psychological distress, income level, and sex using national survey data. I developed an interactive dashboard that allows users to examine patterns and trends in health behavior and mental health outcomes.
</p>

<ul>
<li>Cleaned survey data for analysis</li>
<li>Created interactive visualizations for user exploration</li>
<li>Analyzed relationships between behavioral and demographic variables</li>
</ul>

<a class="button" href="https://charsun0119.github.io/DATA555_final/final-4a.html" target="_blank">
View Dashboard
</a>

<a class="button" href="https://github.com/charsun0119/DATA555_final" target="_blank">
View on GitHub
</a>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Trends in Anxiety and Depression Among U.S. Adults (2020–2024)</h3>

<p>
This project analyzes national trends in anxiety and depression symptoms using data from the CDC Household Pulse Survey. The analysis examines how mental health outcomes changed from the COVID-19 pandemic through the recovery period and identifies disparities across demographic groups.
</p>

<ul>
<li>Analyzed large-scale survey data using Python (pandas, numpy, statsmodels)</li>
<li>Computed annual mean severity scores and visualized trends over time</li>
<li>Built multivariable regression models to identify demographic disparities</li>
</ul>

<p>
Key findings show a significant overall decline in anxiety and depression symptoms from 2020 to 2024, with persistent disparities among certain populations such as bisexual individuals, transgender individuals, and people with disabilities.
</p>

<a class="button" href="https://github.com/charsun0119/BIOS584-Final" target="_blank">
View on GitHub
</a>

<a class="button" href="files/poster.pdf" download>
Download Poster
</a>

</div>
